diagrams.title: Scatter Plot: Positive Correlation
diagrams.description: Shows upward-sloping relationship where variables increase together
elements: Data points trending upward from left to right
Positive slope line passing through points

diagrams.title: Scatter Plot: Negative Correlation
diagrams.description: Shows downward-sloping relationship where variables move in opposite directions
elements: Data points trending downward from left to right
Negative slope line passing through points

diagrams.title: Correlation Scale Visualization
diagrams.description: Number line showing correlation values from -1 to +1 with interpretation zones
diagrams.purpose: Understand strength interpretation of correlation values

diagrams.title: Covariance vs Correlation Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing how normalization transforms covariance to correlation
elements: Covariance: unbounded, scale-dependent, can be any real number
